title: World Manifest
description: Declares a world Entity with its Component attachments. Consumed by packages/registry/bin/generate-tf.ts to emit per-tenant Terraform invocations of loa-freeside/infrastructure/terraform/modules/world/. Schema governance: enum-locked schema_version, additive-only minor bumps, major bumps require new file + migration plan + stable $id (per loa-constructs/.claude/schemas/VERSIONING.md).

allOf.description: v1.2 (cycle-B): cross-field constraint · auth.backend='freeside-jwt' requires tenant_id (the orchestrator dispatches per-tenant TenantAdapter via tenant_id; declaring freeside-jwt without tenant_id is invalid at runtime). Bridgebuilder MEDIUM finding (PR #2 conf 0.85) — surfaced as schema-level rejection rather than runtime-only failure.

schema_version.description: Schema version. Enum-locked per VERSIONING.md. v1.1 (cycle-Q · 2026-05-04) adds optional `quest_namespace` + `quest_engine_config` + `guild_ids` fields for Quest UI Substrate composition. v1.2 (cycle-B · 2026-05-05) adds optional `tenant_id` + `auth` fields for the convergence-spine identity overlay (freeside-auth). v1.0/v1.1 documents validate unchanged.

slug.description: World identifier. Matches terraform/modules/world/variables.tf var.name regex (lowercase alphanumeric + hyphens, 2-21 chars). Used as the terraform module instance name and the {slug}.{domain} subdomain.

name.description: Display name for dashboards + the registry UI (Phase 2). Distinct from slug — name carries casing/spacing for humans, slug is the URL-safe handle.

repo.description: GitHub repo in 'OrgName/repo-name' format. Matches terraform/modules/world/variables.tf var.repo. The repo CI uses OIDC role + ECR push from this slot.

domain.description: Base domain for subdomain routing. Defaults to '0xhoneyjar.xyz' to match terraform module default. Override only when the world lives on a custom apex.

description.description: One-line description for the registry UI + the docstring at the top of the generated .tf file.

hosting.description: Hosting Component — declares where the world runs. Today: ECSHosting on AWS Fargate-Spot. Reserved for VercelHosting / RailwayHosting / MobileBinaryDistribution per ecs-architecture-freeside doctrine.

identity.description: Identity Components — credential systems the world accepts. Multiple permitted (e.g., DynamicAuth + SIWEAdmin).

env_vars.description: Non-secret environment variables. NEXT_PUBLIC_* live here per Next.js convention; they're public-by-design and baked into the client bundle at --build-arg time. Matches terraform/modules/world/variables.tf var.env_vars.

secrets.description: Runtime secrets resolved by ECS from AWS Secrets Manager at task start. Names map to terraform's aws_secretsmanager_secret resources (auto-generated alongside world-{slug}.tf). Values are NEVER in this manifest — populated via load scripts.

compose_with.description: Constructs this world composes-with. Reciprocal — the named construct should appear in this world's grimoire write paths or vice versa. Stage 7 of COSMOGRAPHER's apprenticeship validates this.

network.description: Per-world network extras beyond the module's defaults (HTTPS:443, EFS:2049, Finn:3000). Examples: score-api needs RDS:5432; mibera needs broad TCP outbound for Railway Postgres + WebSocket upgrades.

log_retention_days.description: CloudWatch log retention. Defaults to 30 to match terraform module.

image_tag.description: Docker image tag pushed to ECR. Defaults to 'latest'. Override for pinned-version deploys.

rooms.description: Per-world Room declarations (per world-funnel-topology). Reserved for v1.1+ when a Navigation System reads them at runtime. v1.0 accepts but does not consume.

quest_namespace.description: v1.1 (cycle-Q): per-world quest namespace (kebab-case). Distinct from world `slug` to allow multiple quest collections per world if needed. Read by `freeside-characters/apps/bot/src/world-resolver.ts` during per-guild Layer composition. Per PRD D5 + SDD §7.1. OPTIONAL — worlds without quest engagement omit this field.

quest_engine_config.description: v1.1 (cycle-Q): per-world EngineConfig values consumed at bot composition time. Maps 1:1 to `@freeside-quests/engine` `EngineConfig` shape. Per PRD D4/D5 + SDD §7.1 + §7.2. OPTIONAL — required only when `quest_namespace` is set.

guild_ids.description: v1.1 (cycle-Q): Discord guild snowflakes that this world owns. Read by `freeside-characters/apps/bot/src/world-resolver.ts` for per-guild → per-world resolution (multi-tenant single-bot routing). Per PRD D5 + SDD §7.1. OPTIONAL — worlds without Discord presence omit. May overlap with other worlds for shared guilds (first-match wins).

tenant_id.description: v1.2 (cycle-B · convergence-spine): canonical tenant identifier consumed by `@freeside-auth/engine` (per-tenant TenantAdapter dispatch · `dynamic_users ↔ midi_profiles` join for mibera · `profiles.address+sol_address` for cubquest · etc). Distinct from `slug` (terraform world handle) and `quest_namespace` (per-quest collection key) — `tenant_id` is the IDENTITY axis. Bot's `world-resolver.resolveTenantFromGuild()` returns this value · feeds `auth-bridge.attachAuthContext()`. Per SDD §3 + §12.4. OPTIONAL — worlds without identity composition omit.

auth.description: v1.2 (cycle-B · convergence-spine): per-world auth backend declaration. `freeside-jwt` opts into the freeside-auth verified path (JWT minted by orchestrator · signed by loa-freeside/apps/gateway · verified at consumer via `@freeside-auth/adapters/jwks-validator`). `anon` keeps the world on the cycle-Q anon-default path. Composes orthogonally with the bot's `AUTH_BACKEND` env (Lock-7 · env wins as kill switch). OPTIONAL — defaults to anon when omitted.

type.description: Hosting Component kind. ECSHosting is the only kind v1.0 generates terraform for; others are reserved for future generators.

cpu.description: Fargate CPU units. Defaults to terraform module default (256). Honeyroad uses 512 for Next.js + Sentry build pressure.

memory.description: Fargate memory MB. Defaults to terraform module default (512). Honeyroad uses 1024.

port.description: Container port the app listens on. Default 3000.

desired_count.description: ECS desired task count. Capped at 1 by the terraform module — SQLite-on-EFS requires single-writer. Use 0 to park a world without destroying.

health_check_path.description: ALB health check path. Default '/'. Apps with DB-heavy / IO-heavy homepage routes should use a dedicated /api/health endpoint that returns static 200 — '/' renders that hits Supabase or score-api can exceed the 5s container health-check timeout.

finn_url.description: Finn AI gateway URL override. Empty string = auto-construct via terraform module default (http://finn.{name_prefix}.local:3000).

type.description: Identity Component kind per ecs-architecture-freeside doctrine.

key.description: Secrets Manager key (lowercase). Generator emits aws_secretsmanager_secret with name 'arrakis/{environment}/worlds/{slug}/{key}' and references the env-var name in the terraform module's secrets={} map. Convention: snake_case in Secrets Manager, SCREAMING_SNAKE_CASE in env.

env_var.description: Environment variable name as exposed to the running container. Defaults to UPPER(key).

lifecycle.description: When the secret is consumed. 'build' = BuildKit --secret mount in CI (e.g. SENTRY_AUTH_TOKEN). 'deploy' = CI bootstrap. 'runtime' = ECS resolves at task start (default + most common).

slug.description: Construct slug as it appears at 0xHoneyJar/construct-{slug}.

relationship.description: Why this world composes with this construct. Reciprocal — the construct should appear in this world's grimoire write paths or vice versa.

extra_egress_rules.description: Outbound rules beyond the module's defaults. Example: mibera's broad TCP outbound for Railway Postgres + WebSocket upgrades.

extra_ingress_rules.description: Inbound rules beyond ALB. Rare; example: score-api receives ingress from RDS for the bidirectional rule pair.

cidr_blocks.description: Use either cidr_blocks OR source_security_group_ref (mutually exclusive).

source_security_group_ref.description: Reference to a security group declared in loa-freeside (e.g. 'aws_security_group.rds.id'). Generator copies verbatim.

kind.description: Room kind per world-funnel-topology. Doors are entry surfaces; Landing is first-touch; Identity rooms are bonding; Depth rooms are replay/build.

AuthConfig.description: v1.2 (cycle-B): per-world auth backend declaration. Sealed shape · additive minor bumps allowed.

backend.description: Auth backend the world has opted into. `anon` keeps cycle-Q anon-default (no JWT minted at session-start). `freeside-jwt` activates the verified path (JWT minted by `@freeside-auth/engine` orchestrator · signed by loa-freeside/apps/gateway · verified at consumer).

QuestEngineConfig.description: v1.1 (cycle-Q): per-world configuration for the @freeside-quests/engine. Mirrors the Effect Schema in `@freeside-quests/engine/src/config.ts`. Sealed shape — additive minor bumps allowed alongside engine evolution. Per SDD §4.5 + §7.1.

questAcceptanceMode.description: Per PRD D4 acceptance gate. 'open' = anon-allowed · no badge gate. 'auth-required' = wallet-verified to accept. 'open-badge-gated' = anon accept · verified-only badge issuance (DEFAULT).

submissionStyle.description: Per ARCADE pair-decision D2. 'inline_thread' = user replies in thread (lightweight). 'modal_form' = pop-up modal with structured fields. Per-world default; characters may override via persona.yaml.

positiveFrictionDelayMs.description: Per kickoff §9.5 principle 1 (CHI'26 Labor Illusion). 0 = no delay. 9000-15000 = context-aware delay between submission and verdict reveal. Per-world default; characters may override via persona.yaml.
